verdict_summary: PASS. Fresh verifier reproduced focused web, browser/network, backend Java 21, api-client, root wrapper, JSON, diff and guardrail proof for the scoped mounted N1 read-only status refresh. No blocking proof gaps remain for this sprint contract.

acceptance_verification.n1_continuation_has_user_visible_refresh: PASS: component diff adds N1StatusRefreshPanel with Russian button text `Проверить статус N1`; web test and browser smoke render/click it.
acceptance_verification.refresh_uses_generated_route_progress_th: PASS: refreshStartedN1Status calls loadSafeRouteProgress, derives buildReadOnlyN1LessonProgressFromRouteProgress for SUBMITTED/routePreview/N1/RESUME_N1/N1 STARTED, then calls loadSafeN1LessonDetail. Wrappers call generated fetchLearningMeRouteProgress and fetchLearningMeLessonDetail.
acceptance_verification.refresh_updates_mounted_route_progress_l: PASS: guardrail scan verifies setRouteProgress(safeRouteProgress), setLessonProgress(safeProgress) and setLessonDetail(safeDetail) in the refresh handler.
acceptance_verification.refresh_never_calls_start_mutation: PASS: guardrail scan and browser smoke verify no startLearningMeLesson, POST /start, learning-start request, diagnostic submit or diagnostic draft save on refresh paths.
acceptance_verification.failed_or_unsupported_refresh_keeps_exis: PASS: browser unsupported refresh has second route-progress request only, no second lesson-detail request and no start POST; expected text includes `Не удалось обновить статус` and `Показываем уже открытый материал N1` while original N1 content remains visible.
acceptance_verification.existing_start_n1_first_start_remains_pa: PASS: browser smoke includes first-start scenario with learning-start request, refreshed route-progress and lesson-detail read.
acceptance_verification.existing_readonly_reopen_remains_passing: PASS: browser smoke includes read-only reopen scenario with GET route-progress + GET lesson detail and no learning-start request.
acceptance_verification.token_memory_only: PASS: browser smoke asserts no profile-session token in URL, visible text, request URLs/bodies, localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies, IndexedDB or service-worker surfaces; guardrail scan finds no refresh URL/storage/cookie/history/console surface.
acceptance_verification.no_backend_api_schema_openapi_generated_: PASS: git diff/status and guardrail scans show no apps/api or packages/api-client tracked/untracked changes; api-client generated/openapi drift/typecheck/build and backend Maven checks passed.
acceptance_verification.out_of_scope_preserved: PASS: guardrail scans and evidence confirm no final scoring, R1-R6, HR reports, analytics/events, points/rewards, learning completion, quiz/practice submission, advice, exact sensitive data, customer brand, real data, full MVP closure or human-gate closure.

commands_run.command: jq empty verifier verdict JSON artifacts
git diff --check after writing verifier artifacts
guardrail scans for generated-helper usage, no refresh mutation, token surfaces, backend/API/schema/generated-client drift, out-of-scope expansion, browser request order

superseded_attempts.command: jq browser smoke refresh summary initial expression
superseded_attempts.resolution: Re-ran with a corrected jq object expression; final raw ref now contains the passing summary.

superseded_attempts.command: jq empty changed JSON artifacts including a markdown file by mistake
superseded_attempts.resolution: Re-ran against JSON files only; final raw ref is passing.

superseded_attempts.command: guardrail scan attempt over entire pre-existing component for out-of-scope tokens
superseded_attempts.resolution: Re-ran scoped to the refresh block and added web diff; final guardrail raw ref is passing.

docs_sync.note: Architecture doc section 7.4 now covers mounted N1 refresh through read-only route-progress and conditional lesson-detail reads with no POST /start. No product/API-client doc drift was found for this scoped behavior.

open_items: Final N1 financial correctness and wording review
Legal/privacy boundaries and real employee/customer data processing approval
Production content approval and methodologist publish approval
Points/reward economy and real fulfillment decisions
Admin/support production access policy for sensitive diagnostic/learning data
Design/accessibility QA on real mobile screens

post_pass_note: This verifier wrote only verifier artifacts and latest verdict/problems aliases. Parent/orchestrator sync should update status/progress/publish_manifest from BUILT_AWAITING_FRESH_VERIFIER to PASS before invoking the required post-PASS publish flow.
